HGSS.253.0000:
Captain, play with me, please?\f
I’m bored! I want to play more!\f
HGSS.253.0001:
Wow, you are going to play with me?\f
Let’s play hide-and-seek!
I’ll hide, so close your eyes!\f
HGSS.253.0002:
Wow, you are going to play with me?\f
Let’s play hide-and-seek!
I’ll hide, so close your eyes!\f
HGSS.253.0003:
Wow, you are going to play with me?\f
Let’s play hide-and-seek!
I’ll hide, so close your eyes!\f
HGSS.253.0004:
This little girl keeps asking me to play
with her.\f
Ouch! Please don’t stretch my ear!
HGSS.253.0005:
Thank you for playing with her.\f
You may think being a Captain
is a somewhat easy job, but\r
it’s actually quite demanding.\f
That little passenger has gone out
of the room.\f
She can’t get off the ship, so she
must be hiding somewhere\r
around here.
HGSS.253.0006:
How do you like S.S. Aqua’s ride?\f
She practically skates across
the waves.
HGSS.253.0007:
Long time no see.
How are you doing?\f
The S.S. Aqua is as smooth as she
can be!\f
By the way, I found this mysterious
thing when I went to Sinnoh\r
the other day.\f
Now that we’ve met again,
I would like you to have it.\f
HGSS.253.0008:
Your Bag is full.\f
You must like the [0108,0001,0000] a lot.
